title: Backend Tracing
description: Tempo trace explorer (distributed tracing, OTel → Tempo). The per-service latency-p95 and 5xx-rate timeseries that used to live here were exact duplicates of the 'Service Overview' row in 'Services / Overview' (animeenigma-services) — removed 2026-06-03 to de-duplicate. Use that dashboard for RED metrics; use this one to drill into individual slow traces.
